welcome.intro: Thanks for trying {productName}. We’re thrilled to have you on board. To get started with {productName}, please confirm your account.
welcome.preheader: Welcome to {productName}! Please confirm your email address.
welcome.security_notice: For security, this request was received from a {operating_system} device using {browser_name}. If you did not sign up for an account, please ignore this email or contact support if you have questions.
welcome.subject: Welcome to {productName}! Confirm your Email
welcome.title: Welcome, {name}!
welcome.trouble_hint: If you’re having trouble with the button above, copy and paste the URL below into your web browser.

welcome_verified.intro: Thanks for verifying your email address for {productName}. We’re thrilled to have you on board. You can now start using {productName}.
welcome_verified.preheader: Your email has been verified — welcome to {productName}!
welcome_verified.security_notice: For security, this request was received from a {operating_system} device using {browser_name}. If you did not verify your account, please ignore this email or contact support if you have questions.
welcome_verified.subject: Welcome to {productName}! You’re all set
welcome_verified.title: You’re verified, {name}!
welcome_verified.trouble_hint: If you’re having trouble with the button above, copy and paste the URL below into your web browser.
